name: Urethmel

sheet.name: Urethmel
sheet.background_story:
Urethmel was the second to join the Council after Assiniok. A strict follower of hierarchy and laws, Urethmel does not question the purpose of the Arcane Council and removes emotions completely from his duty. 

As a consequence Assiniok holds great influence over the ever subservient and perhaps naïve Urethmel.

Urethmel is one of few words... but the words he chooses to speak carry great meaning.

description:
